unit.name: WP_Http request HEAD redirection default decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request pre-parse decision that an explicitly supplied HEAD method sets the default redirection count to 0 before wp_parse_args merges defaults. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, wp_parse_args behavior, default/filter values, method normalization, parsed args, Requests redirect option handoff, Requests dispatch, response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
